Summarize the main code changes.

## Why

Explain the problem this PR solves and why this approach was chosen.

## How to Test

1. Install dependencies: `pnpm install`
2. Run checks: `pnpm test` and `pnpm lint`
3. Start app: `pnpm dev`
4. Verify the changed behavior in affected routes, components, or tRPC procedures.

## Screenshots (Optional)

Add before/after screenshots or recordings for UI changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] My changes are focused and scoped to this PR.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for meaningful behavior changes.
- [ ] I updated types, validation, or tRPC contracts where needed.
- [ ] I verified affected React Router routes still work as expected.
- [ ] I ran lint and tests locally.
- [ ] I updated related docs or TODOs when applicable.
